name: Hemoglobin (Hb)
description: Measures the amount of oxygen-carrying protein in red blood cells

name: HbA1c
description: Average blood sugar levels over the past 2-3 months

name: Fasting Blood Glucose
description: Blood sugar level after fasting for at least 8 hours

name: Total Cholesterol
description: Total amount of cholesterol in the blood

name: LDL Cholesterol
description: Low-density lipoprotein, often called 'bad' cholesterol

name: HDL Cholesterol
description: High-density lipoprotein, often called 'good' cholesterol

name: Triglycerides
description: Type of fat found in blood

name: SGPT (ALT)
description: Enzyme found primarily in the liver; indicates liver health

name: SGOT (AST)
description: Enzyme found in liver and other tissues

name: Bilirubin Total
description: Yellow compound produced during breakdown of red blood cells

name: Alkaline Phosphatase
description: Enzyme found in liver, bone, and other tissues

name: Creatinine
description: Waste product filtered by kidneys; indicates kidney function

name: Blood Urea Nitrogen
description: Waste product from protein breakdown; indicates kidney function

name: eGFR
description: Estimates how well kidneys are filtering blood

name: Thyroid Stimulating Hormone
description: Hormone that regulates thyroid gland function

name: Free T4
description: Main hormone produced by thyroid gland

name: Free T3
description: Active thyroid hormone

name: White Blood Cell Count
description: Number of white blood cells; indicates immune system function

name: Red Blood Cell Count
description: Number of red blood cells; carries oxygen

name: Platelet Count
description: Cell fragments that help blood clot

name: Hematocrit
description: Percentage of blood volume occupied by red blood cells

name: Vitamin D
description: Essential vitamin for bone health and immune function

name: Vitamin B12
description: Essential vitamin for nerve function and blood cell production

name: Serum Iron
description: Amount of iron circulating in blood

name: Ferritin
description: Protein that stores iron in the body

name: C-Reactive Protein
description: Marker of inflammation in the body

name: ESR
description: Measures how quickly red blood cells settle; indicates inflammation

name: Uric Acid
description: Waste product; high levels can cause gout

name: Sodium
description: Essential electrolyte for fluid balance and nerve function

name: Potassium
description: Essential electrolyte for heart and muscle function

name: Calcium
description: Essential mineral for bone health and muscle function
